name: Carter's, Inc.
description: Carter's, Inc. is the largest brand marketer of baby and young children's apparel in North America. The company owns several highly recognized brands, including Carter's and OshKosh B'gosh, which are sold through leading department stores, national chains, and specialty retailers, as well as through more than 1,000 company-operated stores and online. Founded in 1865, Carter's has a long history of providing trusted, high-quality, and essential products for families.
